title: Ethical Bundle Optimizer (local co-occurrence matrix, rationales)
description: Implement the Ethical Bundle Optimizer in lib/bundle/. Builds a local co-occurrence matrix from the user's saved/purchased product history (no external data). Suggests 2–3 complementary items when viewing a product. Each suggestion must include a human-readable rationale (e.g. 'Frequently bought together by users with similar eco-preference scores'). No affiliate links ever injected (compliance hard rule). Local-only: zero remote calls. Acceptance criterion: ≥ 15% suggestion acceptance rate in simulated user study. TDD for co-occurrence matrix construction and rationale generation.
